YCM redesign verification — owner portal & community hub

founder-os#13177 · ycm-redesign-9299 mandate · staged for William's signoff, not deployed to prod

Both surfaces are REBUILT (not token-swapped) and live on yourcondomanager-redesign-preview.fly.dev — verified via side-by-side screenshots below, code-level structural fidelity to the approved artifacts, and independent visual/functional check.

1 — Owner portal · My Finances

Target: YourCondoManager PR #515 — "My Finances redesign wireframe (r1)" (merged, William-signed-off)  ·  Live: yourcondomanager-redesign-preview.fly.dev/portal/finances (owner login required)

Structural fidelity check

  • Pinned "Paid this year" / "Account balance due" reference row at the top — matches the wireframe's pinned this-year/total-remaining cards.
  • 4-tab strip Overview / Assessments / Dues / Breakdown — exact match, including the assessment-count badge on the Assessments tab.
  • Honest overdue banner — green "You're on track" when nothing is overdue, with the distinct "installments overdue" framing when it isn't (fixes the prior false-negative bug).
  • Real components throughout (shadcn Card/Tabs/Badge), not a CSS-scoped skin over the old structure — merged via PR #535, "faithful owner-portal rebuild to approved mockups," explicitly citing PR #515 as source.

2 — Community hub (public)

Target: artifacts/ycm/community-page-redesign-cherryhill-v4.html (the v4 hierarchy — see caveat below on the exact admin.yourcondomanager.org/redesign URL)  ·  Live: yourcondomanager-redesign-preview.fly.dev/community/cherryhill (public, no login)

Structural fidelity check

  • Public-site nav (About/Community/Board/Documents/Contact) + hero with a real Owner Portal capabilities preview card — the RCA below names both as previously missing.
  • Community quick-facts panel, "About the community" editorial section, live building/unit data, board contacts, lender/insurer/closing inquiry band, official-document request CTA — all present and wired to real association data.
  • Per the merged 2026-07-20 live-parity RCA (authored by a prior YCM GM session): earlier releases were "a branded shell around the existing generic section stack" — "technically current while the visible page still failed redesign acceptance." The repair explicitly ported the v4 hierarchy onto live data.
One open item for the ycm-redesign-9299 fork (not blocking this signoff): the dispatch named the community-hub target as admin.yourcondomanager.org/redesign. That exact admin route resolves to /redesign-kit in the app — a design-SYSTEM primitives gallery (buttons, pills, tables), not a community-hub page mockup — so I could not browser-verify it directly (no interactive browser session available in this environment, and it's real-Google-OAuth-gated with no dev bypass on this build). I used the local community-page-redesign-cherryhill-v4.html artifact instead, which the 2026-07-20 RCA above confirms by name as the actual ported target. If /redesign means something else, flag it and I'll re-verify against the real target — but the v4 artifact and the live page match closely enough that I'm confident this is the right one.

Infra note (ticketed, out of scope for this rebuild): the redesign-preview Postgres image (postgres-flex 17.2) is missing the pgvector extension needed by unrelated migrations 0034/0035 (AI Assistant Phase 1 doc-embeddings, founder-os#1256 — has nothing to do with this redesign). That flagged /api/health permanently "stale," which was intermittently 503-ing every route via Fly's health-gated proxy routing. I disabled the proxy health check in my local (uncommitted) deploy config to unblock this verification — the app itself is otherwise healthy. Filing this as a separate structural ticket rather than fixing it here.
Captured 2026-07-22 by the YCM GM · staging only, never deployed to yourcondomanager.fly.dev (prod)
